name: M5PORKCHOP
description: M5Cardputer (ESP32-S3) packet-sniffer / pentest-game firmware. Includes offensive WiFi/BLE features (beacon + BLE notification spam) — LABELLED for authorized/lawful testing only; capability retained, never operated by this app.
note: Assets verified live against 0ct0sec/M5PORKCHOP v0.1.8b-PSTH (2026-07-03): releases ship a plain app image plus a *_m5burner.bin MERGED image — this profile matches the m5burner merged bin (bootloader+partitions+app), flashed at 0x0 for a single-file esptool write. Board = M5Cardputer / ESP32-S3FN8 (8MB). Upstream is a PRE-RELEASE beta; pinned to releases/latest. Note: M5Burner flashing nukes NVS (game XP/progress); M5 Launcher preserves it. Real-hardware flash offset pending the Stage-5 hardware gate.
label: M5PORKCHOP (0ct0sec)
